name: hadrons-blessing
description: Source-backed Darktide entity resolution and build audit CLI.

scripts.test: node --test scripts/canonical-build.test.mjs scripts/extract-build.test.mjs scripts/reresolve-builds.test.mjs scripts/ground-truth.test.mjs scripts/cli-contract.test.mjs scripts/coverage.test.mjs scripts/inspect.test.mjs scripts/score-build.test.mjs scripts/export-bot-weapons.test.mjs scripts/tree-edges.test.mjs scripts/build-report.test.mjs scripts/report-formatter.test.mjs scripts/lua-data-reader.test.mjs scripts/talent-settings-parser.test.mjs scripts/condition-tagger.test.mjs scripts/buff-semantic-parser.test.mjs scripts/extract-buff-effects.test.mjs scripts/synergy-model.test.mjs scripts/build-scoring.test.mjs scripts/build-recommendations.test.mjs scripts/extract-breed-data.test.mjs scripts/extract-damage-profiles.test.mjs scripts/damage-calculator.test.mjs scripts/calc-build.test.mjs scripts/calculator-validation.test.mjs
scripts.audit:freeze: for f in tests/fixtures/ground-truth/audits/*.audit.json; do b=$(basename "$f" .audit.json); node scripts/audit-build-names.mjs "scripts/builds/${b}.json" > "$f"; done
scripts.synergy:freeze: for f in tests/fixtures/ground-truth/synergy/*.synergy.json; do b=$(basename "$f" .synergy.json); node scripts/analyze-synergy.mjs "scripts/builds/${b}-"*.json --json > "$f"; done
scripts.check: npm run index:build && npm test && npm run index:check
